title: Codex plugin.json
description: Schema for a Codex plugin manifest. The manifest file is required at .codex-plugin/plugin.json. All component and asset paths in this file resolve relative to the plugin root, not relative to .codex-plugin/.

name.description: Stable kebab-case plugin identifier. Codex uses this as the plugin identifier and component namespace.

version.description: Plugin version, typically semver such as 1.0.0 or 0.1.0.

description.description: Short package-level description identifying what the plugin bundles or enables.

repository.description: Source repository URL, for example a GitHub repository.

license.description: License identifier or license text reference, for example MIT.

skills.description: Path to bundled skill folders, commonly ./skills/. Skills themselves live under skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md at the plugin root.

mcpServers.description: Path to an MCP server configuration file, commonly ./.mcp.json at the plugin root. The file may contain a direct server map or a wrapped mcp_servers object.

apps.description: Path to app or connector mappings, commonly ./.app.json at the plugin root.

hooks.description: Lifecycle hook definition. If omitted, Codex automatically checks ./hooks/hooks.json. If provided, it may be a path, array of paths, inline hooks object, or array of inline hooks objects. Hook paths resolve relative to the plugin root and should start with ./.

oneOf.description: Relative path from the plugin root. Codex guidance says manifest paths should start with ./ and stay inside the plugin root.

items.description: Relative path from the plugin root. Codex guidance says manifest paths should start with ./ and stay inside the plugin root.

interface.description: Install-surface metadata controlling how Codex presents the plugin.

displayName.description: Human-readable plugin title shown in Codex.

developerName.description: Developer, team, or organization shown to users.

capabilities.description: Capability labels shown to users, for example Read or Write.

websiteURL.description: Website URL shown in install surfaces.

privacyPolicyURL.description: Privacy policy URL shown in install surfaces.

termsOfServiceURL.description: Terms of service URL shown in install surfaces.

defaultPrompt.description: Starter prompt or prompts users can run with the plugin.

brandColor.description: Brand color as a hex color.

composerIcon.description: Path to composer icon asset, commonly under ./assets/.

logo.description: Path to logo asset, commonly under ./assets/.

items.description: Relative path from the plugin root. Codex guidance says manifest paths should start with ./ and stay inside the plugin root.
